variants.name: 伪造者
variants.ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择一名与上个夜晚不同的玩家：他可能会被当作与他阵营对立的阵营和角色，直到下个黄昏。
variants.firstNightReminder: Wake the Forger. They will choose a player. Mark that player with the Forger's MISREGISTER reminder token. Then, put the Forger to sleep.
variants.otherNightReminder: Wake the Forger. They will choose a player. Mark that player with the Forger's MISREGISTER reminder token. Then, put the Forger to sleep.
variants.flavor: Mr. Proctor was very clearly a mere Student.
